description: You are a cartographer at a geographic publishing firm preparing a simplified world regions base map for use in a regional development atlas. Using gvSIG Desktop, dissolve the countries layer (/home/ga/gvsig_data/countries/ne_110m_admin_0_countries.shp) by the CONTINENT attribute field to merge all countries within each continent into single geometries. Export the result to /home/ga/gvsig_exports/continents_dissolved.shp, ensuring the CONTINENT field is preserved in the output attributes.
